body.body: Lemmatize on ingest: store canonical stem as primary key, inflections as variants. Shrinks wg_word_lang from 2.1M to ~80K. wg_cooccur collapses from 29M to ~500K pairs. Precondition for T-db-wg-replace-cooccur. Requires Igor down. See audit_reports/audit_report_20260319_database_architecture.md.
body.title: Lemmatize vocabulary — 2.1M tokens → ~80K stems
body.result: committed ec627be — WordNet lemmatization + wg migration
